title: The funds approved by the California Strategic Growth  Council are designed to help Californians drive less and reduce the greenhouse  gas emissions contributing to climate change.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The funds approved by the California Strategic Growth Council are designed to help Californians drive less.",
    "Nearly $12 million has been allocated for the development of 135 affordable apartments in Los Angeles.",
    "The MDC Jordan Downs project is a new LEED-Gold rated infill development consisting of 135 apartments.",
    "The project aims to improve site accessibility by extending Century Boulevard through the existing Jordan Downs housing project.",
    "The MDC Jordan Downs project will open up the 100-acre community to bikes, pedestrians, and cars.",
    "Century Boulevard will be built as a complete street, incorporating traffic calming measures, wide sidewalks, bike lanes, and shade trees.",
    "A re-routed bus line will be included as part of the Century Boulevard extension for facilitating active transportation."
  ]
}
```
